title: Senior Software Engineer, Agent
description:
Descript is building an AI-powered platform for audio and video content creation. The Agent team, launched in July 2025, focuses on building the future of Agentic Video Editing through chat-based editing capabilities.

Key Responsibilities

The role involves three primary focus areas:

1. Agent Quality: Experimentation to enhance video editing agent performance, including harness design, token optimization, and multimodal capabilities
2. Product Experience: Building intuitive interactions for agentic video editing, improving user retention through prompt tuning and product workflows
3. Developer Experience: Creating logging systems, evaluation frameworks, and monitoring feedback loops for agent development

Minimum Qualifications

- 5+ years of professional product engineering or fullstack experience
- Proficiency with TypeScript, React, and RESTful APIs
- Strong CS fundamentals (data structures, algorithms, databases like Postgres/Redis)
- High ownership and growth mindset
- Collaborative team approach

Preferred Qualifications

- Creative tool development experience or regular use of media editing software
- Agent building, evaluation infrastructure, or LLM-powered product design experience

Additional Information

The posting encourages applicants who don't meet every qualification to apply. Descript operates with a flat structure where engineering titles are unified, though staff-level scope roles are actively sought. The company offers healthcare, 401k matching, catered lunches, and flexible vacation time.
